evidence.description: Appointed acting minister on 27 December 2012, confirmed by parliament as minister on 17 March 2013, served until 15 August 2013 when Hassan Ghazizadeh Hashemi took over under President Rouhani.

editorial_notes: Acting minister 27 Dec 2012 – 17 Mar 2013; confirmed minister 17 Mar – 15 Aug 2013.
